other_observers: first found by Brandon Percival also seen by Lisa Edwards and Kara Lewantowicz; Brandon Percival found the bird and I saw it 5 minutes later
specific_location: Chico Basin Ranch along the road between The Casita and the Banding Station
description: This was a small flycatcher, all red on face and undersides with a black mask. The hindneck, nape, back, tail and wings were blackish and there was two faint whitish wingbars.  As the Sibley guide says, unmistakable.Behaviors: This bird spent a lot of time on power lines and fence posts but did some flycatching for minute insects.Call: nonePlumage: alternate
